books.title: Clean Code
books.subtitle: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: Even bad code can function. But if code isn't clean, it can bring a development organization to its knees. Every year, countless hours and significant resources are lost because of poorly written code. But it doesn't have to be that way.

books.title: Introduction to Algorithms
books.subtitle: Comprehensive textbook on algorithms
books.author: Thomas H. Cormen
books.description: An essential reference for students and professionals. Covers a broad range of algorithms in depth, yet makes their design and analysis accessible to all levels of readers.

books.author: Andrew Hunt
books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.subtitle: Your Journey to Mastery
books.description: Direct, practical advice on career, architecture, testing, teamwork, and personal responsibility in software construction.

books.author: Erich Gamma
books.title: Design Patterns
books.subtitle: Elements of Reusable Object-Oriented Software
books.description: The seminal catalog of 23 software design patterns, illustrating how to solve common design problems beautifully in object-oriented systems.

books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.title: Sapiens
books.subtitle: A Brief History of Humankind
books.description: From a renowned historian comes a groundbreaking narrative of humanity’s creation and evolution, exploring how biology and history have defined us.

books.author: James Clear
books.title: Atomic Habits
books.subtitle: An Easy & Proven Way to Build Good Habits & Break Bad Ones
books.description: No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving—every day. James Clear, one of the world's leading experts on habit formation, reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

books.title: Ponniyin Selvan - Part 1: Pudhu Vellam
books.subtitle: புது வெள்ளம் (Fresh Floods)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: The grand epic historical novel detailing the early life of Prince Arulmozhivarman, who would later become the great Chola emperor Rajaraja Chola I.

books.title: Ponniyin Selvan - Part 2: Suzhal Kaatru
books.subtitle: சுழற்காற்று (Whirlwind)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Volume 2 of the legendary Chola dynasty masterpiece, filled with conspiracies, romance, and political intrigue on the seas.

books.title: Ponniyin Selvan - Part 3: Kolai Vaal
books.subtitle: கொலைவாள் (The Sword of Slaughter)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Volume 3 of Kalki's magnum opus where the mystery of the deaf mute queen and Chola conspiracies deepen.

books.title: Ponniyin Selvan - Part 4: Mani Magudam
books.subtitle: மணிமகுடம் (The Jeweled Crown)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Volume 4 of the epic saga, highlighting the battle of crowns and the loyalty of Vallavarayan Vandiyadevan.

books.title: Ponniyin Selvan - Part 5: Thiyaga Sigaram
books.subtitle: தியாக சிகரம் (The Pinnacle of Sacrifice)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: The final emotional volume of Ponniyin Selvan detailing the ultimate sacrifices and the crowning of the new King.

books.title: Thirukkural
books.subtitle: திருக்குறள் (The Sacred Couplets)
books.author: Thiruvalluvar
books.description: A classic Tamil text consisting of 1,330 couplets on ethics, political and economical matters, and love. One of the most important works in the Tamil language.

books.title: Sivagamiyin Sabatham - Part 1
books.subtitle: சிவகாமியின் சபதம் - பாகம் 1
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Set in 7th-century South India, this historical novel revolves around the Pallava emperor Mahendravarman I, his son Narasimhavarman, and the dancer Sivagami.

books.title: Sivagamiyin Sabatham - Part 2
books.subtitle: காஞ்சி முற்றுகை (The Siege of Kanchi)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Volume 2 of Sivagamiyin Sabatham detailing the epic siege of Kanchipuram by the Chalukyan King Pulakeshin II.

books.title: Sivagamiyin Sabatham - Part 3
books.subtitle: பிக்ஷுவின் காதல் (The Bhikshu's Love)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Volume 3 of Sivagamiyin Sabatham, unravelling the plots and the complex relationships surrounding Sivagami's captivity in Vatapi.

books.title: Sivagamiyin Sabatham - Part 4
books.subtitle: சிதைந்த கனவு (The Shattered Dream)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: The tragic and powerful conclusion of Sivagamiyin Sabatham where Narasimhavarman Pallavan destroys Vatapi and Sivagami fulfills her vow.

books.title: Parthiban Kanavu
books.subtitle: பார்த்திபன் கனவு (Parthiban's Dream)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: A historical novel dealing with the struggles of the Chola king Parthiban to regain independence from the Pallava empire.

books.title: Kadal Pura - Part 1
books.subtitle: கடல் புறா (Sea Pigeon)
books.author: Sandilyan
books.description: A thrilling adventure historical novel based on the medieval Chola navy under Kulothunga Chola I and commander Karunakara Tondaiman.

books.title: Kadal Pura - Part 2
books.subtitle: கடல் புறா - பாகம் 2
books.author: Sandilyan
books.description: Volume 2 of Kadal Pura, depicting naval warfare, international diplomacy, and romance in the Srivijaya Kingdom.

books.title: Kadal Pura - Part 3
books.subtitle: கடல் புறா - பாகம் 3
books.author: Sandilyan
books.description: The grand climax of Sandilyan's marine epic showcasing the unmatched dominance of the Chola maritime fleet.

books.title: Yavana Rani - Part 1
books.subtitle: யவன ராணி (The Yavana Queen)
books.author: Sandilyan
books.description: A historical novel centering around Karikalan Cholan, featuring the Roman (Yavana) commander and the princess on the shores of Poompuhar.

books.title: Yavana Rani - Part 2
books.subtitle: யவன ராணி - பாகம் 2
books.author: Sandilyan
books.description: Volume 2 of the classic romantic-adventure historical novel about early Chola politics and foreign relations.

books.title: Alai Osai
books.subtitle: அலை ஓசை (The Sound of Waves)
books.author: Kalki Krishnamurthy
books.description: Awarded the Sahitya Akademi Award, this social novel set during India's struggle for independence portrays the life of a young woman amidst turbulent times.

books.title: Gopallapurathu Makkal
books.subtitle: கோபல்லபுரத்து மக்கள் (People of Gopallapuram)
books.author: Ki. Rajanarayanan
books.description: Winner of the Sahitya Akademi Award, this book depicts the lives of Telugu immigrants settling in the Karisal (black soil) region of southern Tamil Nadu.

books.title: Karisal Kaattu Kadidhangal
books.subtitle: கரிசல் காட்டு கடிதங்கள் (Letters from Karisal)
books.author: Ki. Rajanarayanan
books.description: A profound collection of letters and essays capturing the rich folklore, dialect, and dry rustic landscape of the Karisal region.

books.title: Oru Puliyamarathin Kathai
books.subtitle: ஒரு புளியமரத்தின் கதை (The Tale of a Tamarind Tree)
books.author: Sundara Ramaswamy
books.description: A milestone in modern Tamil literature, using a legendary tamarind tree as a silent witness to a town's changing socio-political climate over decades.

books.title: Mogamul
books.subtitle: மோகமுள் (The Thorn of Passion)
books.author: T. Janakiraman
books.description: A beautiful exploration of Carnatic music, intense forbidden romance, and spiritual maturity in the temple town of Kumbakonam.

books.title: Sila Nerangalil Sila Manidhargal
books.subtitle: சில நேரங்களில் சில மனிதர்கள்
books.author: Jayakanthan
books.description: A revolutionary novel tackling societal hypocrisy, moral judgments, and a woman's path to redemption after trauma.

books.title: Oru Nadigai Nadagam Paarkiral
books.subtitle: ஒரு நடிகை நாடகம் பார்க்கிறாள்
books.author: Jayakanthan
books.description: A deep look into the professional and emotional struggles of a theater actress in modern Madras.

books.title: En Iniya Iyandhira
books.subtitle: என் இனிய இயந்திரா (My Beloved Robot)
books.author: Sujatha
books.description: A classic dystopian sci-fi novel about a futuristic totalitarian regime controlled by a supercomputer and a small rebellious group aided by a robotic dog named Jeano.

books.title: Meendum Jeano
books.subtitle: மீண்டும் ஜீனோ (Jeano Again)
books.author: Sujatha
books.description: The beloved sequel to En Iniya Iyandhira, blending high-tech cybernetics, political philosophy, and AI consciousness in classic Tamil style.

books.title: Kolaiyuthir Kaalam
books.subtitle: கொலையுதிர் காலம் (Autumn of Murders)
books.author: Sujatha
books.description: A thrilling detective story featuring the smart attorney pair Ganesh and Vasanth investigating paranormal occurrences at a British mansion.

books.title: Nylon Kayiru
books.subtitle: நைலான் கயிறு (The Nylon Rope)
books.author: Sujatha
books.description: Sujatha's first full-length detective mystery novel, featuring gripping investigative suspense that kept readers hooked.

books.title: Panchali Sabatham
books.subtitle: பாஞ்சாலி சபதம் (Panchali's Vow)
books.author: Subramania Bharati
books.description: A magnificent poetic rendering of the Mahabharata scene where Draupadi takes her solemn vow, written as a metaphor for Indian independence.

books.title: Bharathiyar Kavithaigal
books.subtitle: பாரதியார் கவிதைகள் (Collected Poems)
books.author: Subramania Bharati
books.description: A comprehensive compilation of patriotic, spiritual, social reform, and romantic poems by the legendary national poet Mahakavi Bharathiyar.

books.title: Kuyil Paattu
books.subtitle: குயில் பாட்டு (The Song of the Cuckoo)
books.author: Subramania Bharati
books.description: A beautiful, allegorical, and romantic dream-narrative poem composed by Bharathiyar during his exile in Pondicherry.

books.title: Kudumba Vilakku
books.subtitle: குடும்ப விளக்கு (The Family Lamp)
books.author: Bharathidasan
books.description: An inspiring poetic work showcasing the virtues of a harmonious family and the critical role of educated women in societal development.

books.title: Azhagiyin Sirippu
books.subtitle: அழகின் சிரிப்பு (The Laughter of Beauty)
books.author: Bharathidasan
books.description: A scenic masterpiece celebrating the raw beauty of nature, rain, flowers, and the Tamil language through exquisite lyrical verses.

books.title: Silappatikaram
books.subtitle: சிலப்பதிகாரம் (The Tale of an Anklet)
books.author: Ilango Adigal
books.description: One of the Five Great Epics of Tamil Literature, narrating the story of Kannagi's fierce justice and her husband Kovalan's tragic death.

books.title: Manimekalai
books.subtitle: மணிமேகலை (The Buddhist Epic)
books.author: Chithalai Chathanar
books.description: A classic Buddhist epic tracing the journey of Manimekalai, Kovalan and Madhavi's daughter, as she renounces worldly pleasures.

books.title: Kamba Ramayanam
books.subtitle: கம்பராமாயணம்
books.author: Kambar
books.description: The legendary 12th-century epic retelling of the Ramayana in classical Tamil, famous for its unmatched poetic grandeur and literary devices.

books.title: Arthamulla Indhu Madham
books.subtitle: அর্থமுள்ள இந்து மதம் (Meaningful Hinduism)
books.author: Kannadhasan
books.description: A deeply philosophical and practical multi-volume treatise explaining ancient customs, life advice, and Hindu spiritual concepts in a clear, relatable tone.

books.title: Kannadhasan Kavithaigal
books.subtitle: கண்ணதாசன் கவிதைகள்
books.author: Kannadhasan
books.description: Selected poetic works and film lyrics from Kaviarasu Kannadhasan, reflecting profound wisdom on love, loss, life, and destiny.

books.title: Zero Degree
books.subtitle: ஜீரோ டிகிரி
books.author: Charu Nivedita
books.description: A pathbreaking postmodern, experimental Tamil novel utilizing non-linear narratives, extreme imagery, and unique formatting.

books.title: Kuruthipunal
books.subtitle: குருதிப்புனல் (River of Blood)
books.author: Indira Parthasarathy
books.description: Sahitya Akademi Award-winning novel focusing on rural class struggles, feudalism, and the tragic Kilvenmani massacre of farmworkers.

books.title: Vengayin Maindhan
books.subtitle: வேங்கையின் மைந்தன் (Son of the Tiger)
books.author: Akilan
books.description: Jnanpith Award-winning historical novel portraying the golden reign of Rajendra Chola I and his conquest of Kadaram and expansion of Gangaikonda Cholapuram.

books.title: Chittirappaavai
books.subtitle: சித்திரப்பாவை (The Painted Portrait)
books.author: Akilan
books.description: A story exploring the clash of idealism, art, commercial greed, and moral values in modern Tamil society.

books.title: Thalamuraigal
books.subtitle: தலைமுறைகள் (Generations)
books.author: Neela Padmanabhan
books.description: A masterful realistic novel focusing on the Eraniel Chettiar community on the border of Tamil Nadu and Kerala, depicting traditional transitions.

books.title: J.J. Sila Kurippugal
books.subtitle: ஜே.ஜே. சில குறிப்புகள் (Some Notes of J.J.)
books.author: Sundara Ramaswamy
books.description: A brilliant philosophical and intellectual mock-biography of a fictional Malayalam writer, critique of standard modern cultural life.

books.title: Thenpandi Singam
books.subtitle: தென்பாண்டி சிங்கம் (The Lion of the South)
books.author: M. Karunanidhi
books.description: A grand historical narrative highlighting the heroism, military strategies, and culture of the Pandyan rulers.

books.title: Romapuri Pandian
books.subtitle: ரோமாபுரி பாண்டியன்
books.author: M. Karunanidhi
books.description: An epic tale outlining the cultural, trade, and political relationship between ancient Roman emperors and Pandyan Kings.

books.title: Sangathamil
books.subtitle: சங்கத் தமிழ் (Classical Sangam Tamil)
books.author: M. Karunanidhi
books.description: A poetic and prose commentary reviving the ancient Sangam poetry, making classical themes accessible to modern audiences.

books.title: Thiruvasagam
books.subtitle: திருவாசகம் (Sacred Utterances)
books.author: Manikkavasagar
books.description: A beautiful 9th-century compilation of Shaivite hymns expressing absolute devotion, spiritual union, and intense longing for Shiva.

books.title: Periya Puranam
books.subtitle: பெரியபுராணம் (The Great Purana)
books.author: Sekkizhar
books.description: A classic hagiographic epic detailing the miraculous lives of the sixty-three Nayanars, the traditional saints of Shaivism.

books.title: Maniola
books.subtitle: மனோலா
books.author: Sujatha
books.description: A thrilling futuristic sci-fi about human psychology, mechanical brains, and bio-tech advancements in a sci-fi Madras.

books.title: Sujatha Sirukathaigal
books.subtitle: சுஜாதா சிறுகதைகள் (Selected Stories)
books.author: Sujatha
books.description: A collection of Sujatha's most ingenious and clever short stories blending tech, humor, human relations, and twists.

reviews.comment: This book changed how I think about coding completely. A must-read for any software professional.
A magnificent guide to habit construction. Every micro habit builds the temple of the mind.

notifications.title: Book Overdue Warning
notifications.message: The book 'Design Patterns' was due on 2026-07-04. Please return it as soon as possible to avoid further fines.

notifications.title: Reservation Placed
notifications.message: Your reservation request for 'Design Patterns' has been placed successfully and is pending librarian review.
